en.name_en: Tenpō 2 (1831) Mathematical Votive Tablet of Kannon-ji Temple
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a mathematical votive tablet (sangaku) dated Tenpō 2 (1831). Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2002-08-01. Located at Yado, Akaogi, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 葛西晴信書状
items.description: 一関市博物館蔵。江戸時代。葛西17代晴信の花押印文書。中世史研究の史料。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a letter written by Kasai Harunobu. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1998-08-10. Located at Okinono, Gembi-chō, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 釈迦涅槃像図幅
items.description: 瑞昌寺蔵。江戸時代。力士関戸億右エ門(1736-1782)が徳川家斉より賜り奉納。作者は法橋琢舟、明和4年(1767)制作。

en.name_en: Hanging Scroll of the Death of Shakyamuni (Nirvana)
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a hanging scroll depicting the death (nirvana) of Shakyamuni. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1982-02-15. Located at Teramae, Nagai, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: 吹子
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代～明治時代。3基の吹子。「陸前気仙御吹床高田大町」「菅坐佐七作」焼印。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a bellows. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1987-05-01. Located at Shimo-Kawara, Ōhara, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 高炉用吹子(水車吹)
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代～明治時代。高さ・胴回りともに約1m四方。水車を動力源とする高炉用吹子。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a water-wheel-powered blast-furnace bellows. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1991-03-01. Located at Noda, Nakagawa, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 豊吉之墓
items.description: 一関市医師会蔵。江戸時代。天明5年(1785)一関藩医16人が刑死者豊吉を解剖・供養した記念碑。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, the grave of Toyokichi. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1979-04-01. Located at Harashita, Mashiba, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 石塔婆
items.description: 龍澤寺蔵。鎌倉時代。弘安4年(1281)墭照沙門が建立。高さ171cm、幅約53cm。粘板岩製。三尊梵字を刻む。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone stupa tablet. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1979-04-01. Located at Sawada, Nakazato, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 正中二年阿弥陀種子石塔婆
items.description: 個人蔵。鎌倉時代。「王壇」中央に建つ。阿弥陀如来を表す梵字「キリーク」。正中2年(1325)供養のため建立。

en.name_en: Shōchū 2 (1325) Amida Seed-Syllable Stone Stupa Tablet
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone stupa tablet bearing an Amida seed-syllable, dated Shōchū 2 (1325). Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1982-02-15. Located at Fujita, Oimatsu, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: 元応二年金剛界成身会種子曼荼羅石塔婆
items.description: 個人蔵。鎌倉時代。元応2年(1320)紀年銘。金剛界五仏と四供養菩薩をマンダラとして彫る。

en.name_romaji: Genō Ninen Kongōkai Jōjinne Shuji Mandara Sekitōba
en.name_en: Genō 2 (1320) Vajradhatu Seed-Syllable Mandala Stone Stupa Tablet
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone stupa tablet with a Vajradhatu seed-syllable mandala, dated Genō 2 (1320). Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1982-02-15. Located at Kami-Kitaura, Hanaizumi, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: 貞治三年金剛界大日種子石塔婆
items.location: 花泉町花泉字上舘(二桜城跡)
items.description: 個人蔵。室町時代。金剛界大日如来を表す梵字バン。貞治3年(1364)紀年銘。二桜城主三代の諱名を刻む。

en.name_romaji: Jōji Sannen Kongōkai Dainichi Shuji Sekitōba
en.name_en: Jōji 3 (1364) Vajradhatu Dainichi Seed-Syllable Stone Stupa Tablet
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone stupa tablet with a Vajradhatu Dainichi seed-syllable, dated Jōji 3 (1364). Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1982-02-15. Located at Kamidate (Nisakura Castle Site), Hanaizumi, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: 奥州三十三所観音霊場札所納札
items.description: 個人蔵。附 古文書「奥州順礼記」。江戸時代。奥州三十三所観音霊場の納札。縦59.9cm、横20.7cm。「十九番」御詠歌。

en.name_romaji: Ōshū Sanjūsansho Kannon Reijō Fudasho Nōsatsu
en.name_en: Pilgrimage Offering Slips of the Ōshū Thirty-Three Kannon Sacred Sites
en.description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk property consisting of pilgrimage offering slips. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1986-03-28. Located at Nagasawamae, Kanezawa, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: 奥州三十三所観音巡礼再興納札
items.description: 東川院蔵。江戸時代。宝暦11年(1761)巡礼再興時の納札。現存2点。

en.name_romaji: Ōshū Sanjūsansho Kannon Junrei Saikō Nōsatsu
en.name_en: Pilgrimage Revival Offering Slips of the Ōshū Thirty-Three Kannon
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, offering slips marking the revival of the Ōshū Thirty-Three Kannon pilgrimage. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1991-03-01. Located at Kobayashi, Shibumi, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 石水鉢
items.description: 八幡神社蔵。江戸時代。元禄10年(1697)津山城受取りの大任成就を祝い、一関藩家中一同が八幡神社に奉納。上縁144cm×72cm、高さ76cm、安山岩製。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone water basin. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1986-07-01. Located at Tsuriyama, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 摺沢八幡神社の鐙
items.description: 摺沢八幡神社蔵。平安時代。高さ31cm、底辺19cmの鉄製。永保年間(1081-1084)八幡太郎義家が使用と伝わる。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, stirrups. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1991-03-01. Located at Hachimanmae, Surisawa, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 陸奥郡郷考および版木
items.description: 一関市博物館蔵。江戸時代。儒学者関養軒(諱元龍)が文政7年(1824)著した地誌「陸奥郡郷考」2巻。天保5年(1834)版木印刷。

en.name_en: Study of the Districts and Villages of Mutsu Province and Its Printing Blocks
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a study of the districts and villages of Mutsu Province and its printing blocks. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1973-11-03. Located at Okinono, Gembi-chō, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 金山板製御本判
items.description: 一関市博物館蔵。安土桃山時代。豊臣秀吉が発行した金山採掘鑑札。杉板製、高さ113mm、幅89mm、厚さ2.5mm。文禄3年(1594)。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, an official seal made of a gold-ore plate. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1998-08-10. Located at Okinono, Gembi-chō, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 智拳院修験資料
items.description: 白山姫神社蔵。江戸時代。本山派修験智拳院の資料。古文書32通、版木6点、絵馬6点、法具8点。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, materials relating to Shugendō from Chikenin. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2005-04-25. Located at Kōnosu, Yushima, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: ブリタニカ百科事典
items.description: 一関市(双思堂文庫内)蔵。1768年初版から刊行。所蔵41冊中38冊を平成14年一括指定。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a set of the Encyclopaedia Britannica. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2002-12-25. Located at Takinosawa, Matsukawa, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 一切経蔵(六角堂)
items.description: 祥雲寺蔵。江戸時代。黄檗版一切経6,771巻を安置する堂。安永元年(1772)起工、文化11年(1814)一切経入蔵。通称六角堂。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a repository for the complete Buddhist canon, built as a hexagonal hall. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1973-11-03. Located at Daimachi, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 石殿
items.description: 個人蔵。室町時代。天文2年(1533)紀年銘。総高83cm、幅53cmの安山岩製石殿。切妻造り平入り。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone shrine. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1976-06-01. Located at Sasaya, Akaogi, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 石室
items.description: 個人蔵。室町時代。天正2年(1574)紀年銘。安山岩製で総高90cm、基礎・室・寺院形式の方形屋根を組合わせる。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone chamber. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1976-06-01. Located at Toyama, Akaogi, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 宝篋印石塔
items.description: 個人蔵。室町時代。三釣木義継の供養塔。永禄元年(1558)死亡。現状高さ168cm。市内最古の宝篋印塔。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a Hōkyōin-type stone pagoda. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1976-06-01. Located at Dōnosawa, Hagishō, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 羽黒派修験道場
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代。鬼伏山普門寺→羽黒派修験大学院の道場。2匹の龍と「文化四年(1807)朔天十二月 尊号」の銘。安永4年(1775)風土記に記載、築200年以上。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a Shugendō training hall of the Haguro school. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1983-02-25. Located at Nishinosawa, Sōkei, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 配志和神社社殿
items.description: 配志和神社蔵。江戸時代。延喜式内社。本殿と拝殿を幣殿でつなぐ複合社殿。拝殿二手先組、化粧屋根裏構、欄間彫刻。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, the main shrine building of Haishiwa Shrine. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1986-07-01. Located at Tate, Yamanome, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 五輪石塔
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代。願成寺墓地内に5基の石塔。最古は寛永20年(1643)紀年銘。安山岩製。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a five-ring (gorintō) stone pagoda. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1986-07-01. Located within the cemetery of Ganjō-ji Temple.

items.name: 五輪石塔
items.description: 個人蔵。室町時代。葛西氏家臣前堀館主小野寺左馬之丞の墓と伝わる。高さ103cm、安山岩製。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a five-ring (gorintō) stone pagoda. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1986-07-01. Located at Ishihata, Nakazato, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 月館神社(本殿・拝殿)
items.description: 月館神社蔵。江戸時代。本殿は岩穴が内陣、素木造の一間社流造。天正12年(1584)造営、享保9年(1724)拝殿建立。

en.name_en: Tsukidate Shrine (Main Hall and Worship Hall)
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, the main hall and worship hall of Tsukidate Shrine. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1990-12-14. Located at Idosawa, Hikata, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: 千葉胤秀旧宅
items.location: 花泉町老松字佐野屋敷
items.description: 一関市・花泉支所蔵。江戸時代。和算家千葉胤秀(1775-1849)の旧宅。寄棟造の茅屋根。築200年前後。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, the former residence of Chiba Tanehide. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1990-12-14. Located at Sanoyashiki, Oimatsu, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: 林ノ沢観音堂
items.description: 桜森神社蔵。江戸時代。方一間半四面の宝形造。享保9年(1724)火災焼失、享保10年(1725)頃再興、天保2年(1831)再興墨書。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a Kannon hall. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1993-02-24. Located at Rinnosawa, Okutama, Senmaya-chō.

items.name: 旧沼田家武家住宅
items.description: 一関市蔵。江戸時代。沼田家は伊達政宗に仕えた長命が中興初代。寛保元年(1741)から居住。18世紀初頭～中頃創建。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, the former samurai residence of the Numata family. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1999-07-01. Located at Tamuramachi, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 日吉神社三殿一体
items.description: 日吉神社蔵。江戸時代。安永風土記によると正平5年(1350)勧請。本殿・拝殿・幣殿の三殿一体構成。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, the three-in-one shrine halls of Hiyoshi Shrine. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2003-04-01. Located at Uchinome, Iyasaka, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 智拳院道場
items.description: 白山姫神社蔵。附 棟札24枚。江戸時代か。寄棟造の鉄板葺、間口六間・奥行三間五尺、8帖間3室。文化5年(1808)建築伝。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a training hall. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2005-04-25. Located at Kōnosu, Yushima, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: 芦家住宅
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代。嘉永5年(1852)仙台藩13代藩主伊達慶邦の宿泊用として仙台藩邸を真似て建てた離れ座敷。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, the residence of the Ashi family. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2005-09-02. Located at Isedō, Shibumi, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 神楽蛇面
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代。古内神楽の蛇面。キリ材。天保12年(1841)年号。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk property consisting of a serpent mask used in kagura. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1973-11-03. Located at Ōkubo, Hagishō, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 獅子頭
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代。幅30cm、奥行32cm、高さ24.5cmのイチョウ製。「明和二(1765)乙酉九月十七日」刻銘。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk property consisting of a lion-dance head. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1979-04-01. Located at Komagata, Gembi-chō.

items.name: 常香盤
items.description: 祥雲寺蔵。江戸時代。香時計。高さ約60cm。「奉納 常香盤 文政元年(1818)十月吉日 施主 熊谷屋伊蔵」墨書。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk property consisting of an incense time-keeping tray. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1979-04-01. Located at Daimachi, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 瑞山神楽〆切舞
items.description: 庭元個人。江戸時代。須川山麓の瑞山口に祀られた国首三神社に奉納。瑞山国首神楽が正式名称。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property consisting of the Shimekiri dance of Mizuyama kagura. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1973-11-03. Located at Yokomori, Gembi-chō.

items.name: 布佐神楽
items.description: 布佐神楽保存会・マルヤ住建株式会社蔵。江戸時代。文久3年(1863)千葉忠之丞ほか17名が法印神楽を伝授。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property consisting of the Fusa kagura performance. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1978-03-18. Located at Ishikura, Monzaki, Kawasaki-chō.

items.name: 大門神楽
items.description: 大門神楽連中蔵。明治時代。天保6年(1835)千葉依人を師とし、明治11年神楽組結成。法印神楽。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property consisting of the Daimon kagura performance. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1978-03-31. Located at Ōmonsawa, Kanezawa, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: 浜横沢神楽
items.description: 浜横沢神楽保存会蔵。大正時代。日清戦争(1894-1895)大勝を記念。加藤新三郎が創設。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property consisting of the Hamayokosawa kagura performance. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1990-06-01. Located at Orikabe, Murone-chō.

items.name: 峠山伏神楽
items.description: 峠山伏神楽保存会蔵。江戸時代。大償野口斎部流峠山伏神楽。文久年間(1861-1864)伝承。早池峰系山伏神楽。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property consisting of the Tōge Yamabushi kagura performance. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1994-04-26. Located at Yamataki, Sarusawa, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 折壁鹿踊り
items.description: 折壁鹿踊保存会蔵。江戸時代。舞川行山流鹿子躍の流れ。天明2年(1782)伝承、天保3年(1832)から下折壁村の菊松に伝わる。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property consisting of the Orikabe deer dance (shishiodori). Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1987-06-01. Located at Orikabe, Murone-chō.

items.name: 金沢八幡神社大名行列(遷宮記念行列)
items.description: 金沢八幡神社大名行列連中蔵。江戸時代。宝暦7年(1757)新殿完成の遷宮に伴い内沢地区の氏子が行列を始める。

en.name_romaji: Kanezawa Hachiman Jinja Daimyō Gyōretsu (Sengū Kinen Gyōretsu)
en.name_en: Feudal-Lord Procession of Kanezawa Hachiman Shrine (Shrine-Transfer Commemoration Procession)
en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property consisting of a feudal-lord procession. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1978-03-31. Located at Ōyanagi, Kanezawa, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: 保存技術保持者(南部神楽)
items.description: 個人蔵。明治25年。南部神楽の蓬田神楽。明治25年蓬田大助が創設。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property recognizing a holder of the preservation technique for Nambu kagura. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1999-04-01. Located at Yomogita, Maikawa, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 大東大原水かけ祭り
items.description: 大東大原水かけ祭り保存会蔵。江戸時代。明暦3年(1657)の大火が火元の俗説。厄払い・火防祈願の祭り。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property consisting of the Ōhara water-splashing festival. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2005-09-02. Located at Kawauchi, Ōhara, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 東山和紙製造技法
items.description: 東山和紙振興会蔵。年代不祥。平安末期の文治5年(1189)奥州藤原氏の落人が始めたと伝わる。約800年の歴史。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property consisting of the technique for making Higashiyama washi (Japanese paper). Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1989-03-24. Located at Machi, Nagasaka, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 二桜舘
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 清水公園保存会蔵。別名清水城、舞鶴城。延暦年間(782-806)坂上田村麻呂の館跡と伝わる。主郭南北約75m、東西約70m。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a fortified residence site. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1976-03-13. Located at Kamidate, Hanaizumi, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: 朝日舘
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 愛宕山広場保存会蔵。金沢城、東雲城とも。標高約75mの愛宕山。中世城館跡。康永元年(1342)。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a fortified residence site. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1976-03-13. Located at Nishikawa, Kanezawa, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: 山吹城本丸址
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 一関市・大東支所蔵。山吹城は葛西七騎の一人東山千葉氏の居城。別名大原城。本丸東西55間・南北22間。天正18年(1590)落城。

en.name_en: Main Bailey Site of Yamabuki Castle
en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), the main bailey site of Yamabuki Castle. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1979-03-20. Located at Yamabuki, Ōhara, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 上折壁城跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。中世～近世初期。気仙沼街道の要衝。天正18年(1590)千葉右馬之丞旗頭。城跡東西250m、南北200m。輪郭式山城。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a castle site. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1980-09-01. Located at Senkarita, Yagoshi, Murone-chō.

items.name: 金鶏城跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 龍泉寺ほか蔵。中世。城域東西150m、南北300m。葛西一族千葉遠江守義義の城と伝わる。連郭式山城。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a castle site. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1980-09-01. Located at Hijirisawa, Orikabe, Murone-chō.

items.name: 唐梅館
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 一関市・東山支所蔵。中世。長坂千葉氏約400年の居城。標高約250m。天正17年(1589)小田原参陣是非の軍議の地。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a fortified residence site. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1989-03-24. Located at Nishihonchō, Nagasaka, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 薄衣城址
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 川崎町薄衣字古舘 ほか
items.description: 個人蔵。中世。葛西氏重臣薄衣千葉氏の居城。天正18年(1590)まで337年間支配。主郭標高約78m、大きく4つの郭。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a castle site. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1998-07-01. Located at Furudate and elsewhere, Usuginu, Kawasaki-chō.

items.name: 七里塚(一里塚)
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 大東町猿沢字伊沢田北沢
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代。慶長9年(1604)大道に一里塚。江刺街道の山滝に現存する七里塚。気仙街道。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a milestone mound (ichirizuka). Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1979-03-20. Located at Izawadakitazawa, Sarusawa, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 岩間一里塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代。元禄11年(1698)「東山絵図」に8ヶ所記載。現存は岩間一里塚と鼠沢七里塚のみ。気仙沼街道から分岐。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a milestone mound (ichirizuka). Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1985-03-18. Located at Iwama, Senmaya, Senmaya-chō.

items.name: 鼠沢七里塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 千厩町小梨字鼠沢、猫沢
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代。元禄11年(1689)「東山絵図」に8ヶ所。街道両側に認められるのはこの鼠沢七里塚のみ。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a milestone mound. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1990-04-26. Located at Nezumizawa and Nekozawa, Konashi, Senmaya-chō.

items.name: 迫街道一里塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 一関市萩荘字苅又、字古田
items.description: 一関市蔵。江戸時代。迫街道の一里塚。寛永19年(1642)「伊達藩図」、元禄12年(1699)「西磐井郡図」に記載。相対して築かれた2基。

en.name_en: Milestone Mound of the Hakumachi Highway
en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a milestone mound of the Hakumachi Highway. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1979-04-01. Located at Karimata and Furuta, Hagishō, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 中西一里塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代。気仙沼街道の一里塚。花泉金沢宿を起点。JR大船渡線新月駅近く右側現道沿い、高さ1.5m、基底部周囲約7m。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a milestone mound. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1980-09-01. Located at Gotanda, Orikabe, Murone-chō.

items.name: 七日市一里塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代。気仙沼街道の一里塚。千厩から金田村、熊田倉村を経て折壁宿の境界近く。片側一基現存、高さ約2m。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a milestone mound. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1980-09-01. Located at Nanokaichi, Yagoshi, Murone-chō.

items.name: 往還塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代。千厩街道左手。明和2年(1765)建立の一字一石供養碑を中心に19基の石仏。十三仏・六観音。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a highway mound. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2004-11-01. Located at Kazuma, Usuginu, Kawasaki-chō.

items.name: 境塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。年代不祥。村の境界の境塚。長坂村(東山町長坂)と田河津村の村境。2基の石碑が所在。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a boundary mound. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1995-07-28. Located at Yokosawa, Tagawazu, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 道標
items.description: 一関市蔵。江戸時代。「是に従いて」銘文。北に「大原みち」等。安永8年(1779)紀年銘。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk property consisting of a stone guidepost. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1983-02-24. Located at Okinaka, Okutama, Senmaya-chō.

items.name: 道標
items.description: 一関市蔵。江戸時代。「奥州仙台領国絵図」を元に模写。「右ハおりかべ道」「左ハはらみち」。文化13年(1816)紀年銘。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk property consisting of a stone guidepost. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1983-02-24. Located at Machishita, Okutama, Senmaya-chō.

items.name: 道標
items.description: 仏坂自治会蔵。江戸時代。「川に従いて」銘文。宝暦13年(1763)紀年銘。千厩地域最古の紀年銘道標。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk property consisting of a stone guidepost. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1993-02-24. Located at Kadashiro, Iwashimizu, Senmaya-chō.

items.name: 道標
items.description: 一関市蔵。江戸時代。平成7年葉山地内河川復旧工事中発見。宝暦5年(1768)銘。「是に従いて」形式。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk property consisting of a stone guidepost. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1998-08-10. Located at Hayama, Iwashimizu, Senmaya-chō.

items.name: 道標
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 東山町長坂字南磐井里
items.description: 一関市蔵。年代不祥。石碑中央に地蔵尊。不慮の事故を遂げた人の供養と旅人の安全を願う。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a stone guidepost. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1995-07-28. Located at Minami-Iwaisato, Nagasaka, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 道標
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 東山町田河津字石ノ森
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代。石碑上部に地蔵尊二体。文政12年(1829)建立。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a stone guidepost. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1995-07-28. Located at Ishinomori, Tagawazu, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 道標
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。江戸時代。三叉路の大小4基の石碑。寛延2年(1749)建立。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a stone guidepost. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1995-07-28. Located at Maruki, Tagawazu, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 青柳倉記碑
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 一関市蔵。江戸時代。青柳文蔵(1761-1839)が建設した「青柳倉」の記念碑。青柳文庫は公共図書館の始まり。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a stone monument recording a granary. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1989-03-24. Located at Nakadōri, Matsukawa, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 菅公夫人の墓
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 一関市蔵。年代不祥。菅原道真の夫人吉祥女の墓と伝わる。延喜6年(906)没。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a grave. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1995-07-28. Located at Takezawa, Tagawazu, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 磐井清水
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 東山町松川字卯入道平
items.description: 一関市蔵。平安末期奥州藤原氏3代秀衡が若水として汲ませた清水の故事。平成5年再現。

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki), a spring. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1995-07-28. Located at Unyūdōdaira, Matsukawa, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 宗松寺の杉並木
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 東山町松川字町裏ノ上
items.description: 宗松寺蔵。参道山門から約200mに約30数本の杉の大木。指定当時樹高約40m、幹周約4.80m、樹齢約470年。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), an avenue of cedar trees. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1980-04-24. Located at Machiuranoue, Matsukawa, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 配志和神社の夫婦杉
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 配志和神社蔵。神社正面広場南北に2本の杉の巨木。樹高約42m、幹周約4.3m、樹齢1000年。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a pair of cedar trees. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1991-04-01. Located at Tate, Yamanome, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 白鳥神社の姥杉
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 配志和神社蔵。白鳥神社参道入口。杉の巨木。樹高約37m、幹周約6.1m、樹齢1000年。「姥杉」。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), an ancient cedar tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1991-04-01. Located at Tate, Yamanome, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: 宗松寺のモミ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 東山町松川字町裏ノ上
items.description: 宗松寺蔵。門前参道脇の大モミ。樹高約35m、幹周約4.5m、樹齢約590年。竜沢山宗松寺。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a fir tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1980-04-24. Located at Machiuranoue, Matsukawa, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 双根のモミ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 遠応寺蔵。「ふたつ根の樅」。もう一方が現存、樹齢約580年。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a double-rooted fir tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1980-04-24. Located at Natsuyama, Tagawazu, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 配志和神社のモミ林
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 配志和神社蔵。神社東斜面のモミ林。代表的なモミは樹高30m、幹周3.5m、樹齢350年以上。北限付近最大級。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a grove of fir trees. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1991-04-01. Located at Tate, Yamanome, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: モミ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 舞草神社蔵。樹高約32m、幹周約4.3m、樹齢約250年。御神木。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a fir tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2005-05-01. Located at Ōdaira, Maikawa, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: シダレヒガン
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 観林寺蔵。エドヒガンの変種。別名イトザクラ。樹高約14m、幹周約3.8m、樹齢約370年。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a weeping Higan cherry tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1980-04-24. Located at Nodo, Tagawazu, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 種蒔桜
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。エドヒガンの巨木。別名お化け桜。樹高約14m、目通周5.1m、樹齢約400年。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a cherry tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1981-03-20. Located at Monomiishi, Okutama, Senmaya-chō.

items.name: エドヒガン
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 温泉神社蔵。須川温泉神社境内の御神木。樹高約15m、幹周約3.6m、樹齢370-400年。別名貞山桜。伊達政宗植樹と伝わる。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), an Edohigan cherry tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2001-07-01. Located at Takinoue, Gembi-chō.

items.name: サイカチ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。マメ科の落葉高木。樹高約10m、幹周囲約4.7m、樹齢300年以上。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a Japanese honey locust tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2001-07-01. Located at Toyama, Akaogi, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: サイカチ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。「天神角のサイカチ」。樹高約25m、幹周約7.9m、樹齢約400年。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a Japanese honey locust tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2004-11-25. Located at Yakushizawa, Nagai, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: サイカチ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。「堤下のサイカチ」。樹高約18m、幹周約4.8m、樹齢400-500年。葛西氏再興祈念。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a Japanese honey locust tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2004-11-25. Located at Magoroku, Kanezawa, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: イチョウ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 東山町田河津字田ノ萱
items.description: 個人蔵。雌株。樹高約30m、幹周約5.1m、樹齢約310年。乳(柱瘤)がある。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a ginkgo tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1980-04-24. Located at Tanokaya, Tagawazu, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 紅梅
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 安養寺蔵。バラ科落葉高木の梅。樹高約6.5m、幹周約1.34m、樹齢約370年。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a red-blossom plum tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1980-04-24. Located at Higashi-Honchō, Nagasaka, Higashiyama-chō.

items.name: 神中の桂
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。「神中の桂」。北向き斜面。樹高約19.5m、幹周約7.4m、樹齢約350年。貞治3年(1364)銘の板碑発見。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a katsura tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1981-03-20. Located at Tenjin, Konashi, Senmaya-chō.

items.name: 糸ヒバ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 鷺嶺庵蔵。仙翁山鷺嶺庵境内のヒヨクヒバ。別名イトヒバ、シダレヒバ。樹高約20m、目通周約3.6m。「さかさひば」。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a thread-leaf hiba cypress. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1981-03-20. Located at Sekigami, Iwashimizu, Senmaya-chō.

items.name: 長泉寺のカヤ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 長泉寺蔵。イチイ科カヤ属の常緑針葉樹。釣山公園入口に見られる。数が非常に少ない樹木。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a Japanese nutmeg-yew (kaya) tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1991-04-01. Located at Tateshita, Hagishō, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: イロハモミジ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。別名イロハカエデ、タカオカエデ。樹齢200-300年。片平城(上黒沢城)跡に所在。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), an iroha maple. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1991-10-01. Located at Tateyama, Hagishō, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: コナラ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。ブナ科の落葉高木。樹齢約400年。枝の多くが枯死し樹勢衰退。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a konara oak tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 1991-10-01. Located at Nagakura, Hagishō, Ichinoseki City.

items.name: シラカシ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 個人蔵。ブナ科コナラ属の常緑高木。樹高約27m、幹周約3.7m、樹齢300年以上。県内最大規模。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a white oak (shirakashi) tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2004-11-25. Located at Izawakuro, Yushima, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: シダレグリ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 一関市蔵。シダレグリ2株が現存。大きい株樹高約2.4m幹周1.54m、小さい株樹高約3.2m幹周1.29m、樹齢約300年。

en.description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a weeping chestnut tree. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2004-11-25. Located at Kamidōri, Hikata, Hanaizumi-chō.

items.name: 芦東山日記
items.description: 一関市(18冊)・個人(2冊)。員数20冊。江戸時代(享保17年1732～安永5年1776)。儒学者芦東山の直筆日記。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of old documents, the diary of Ashi Tōzan. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2020-08-19. Located at Shibumi, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 玩易齋遺稿
items.description: 一関市蔵。員数23冊。大正時代ほか。芦東山の遺書を清書し編纂した遺稿集。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of classical texts, the posthumous manuscripts of Gan'eki-sai. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2020-08-19. Located at Shibumi, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 白澤神社おためし神事
items.subcategory: 無形民俗文化財(風俗慣習)
items.description: 白澤神社筒粥の神事「おためし」保存会。粥占と田遊びの行事。

en.name_en: Otameshi Divination Rite of Shirasawa Shrine
en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property in the field of customs, the Otameshi divination rite of Shirasawa Shrine. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2020-08-19. Located at Nishiguchi, Fujisawa-chō.

items.name: 小沼鹿踊
items.subcategory: 無形民俗文化財(民俗芸能)
items.description: 小沼鹿踊保存会。行山流鹿踊のうち大原山口系。「太鼓踊系」鹿踊り。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property in the field of folk performing arts, the Konuma deer dance. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2020-08-19. Located at Surisawa, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 下猿澤伊勢神楽
items.subcategory: 無形民俗文化財(民俗芸能)
items.description: 下猿澤伊勢神楽保存会。元文年間(1736-1741)由来の伊勢神楽。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property in the field of folk performing arts, the Shimo-Sarusawa Ise kagura. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2020-08-19. Located at Sarusawa, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 渋民伊勢神楽
items.subcategory: 無形民俗文化財(民俗芸能)
items.description: 渋民伊勢神楽保存会。明治始め頃から渋民地区で伝承。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property in the field of folk performing arts, the Shibumi Ise kagura. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2020-08-19. Located at Shibumi, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 舞草鉦太鼓念仏
items.subcategory: 無形民俗文化財(民俗芸能)
items.description: 舞草鉦太鼓念仏保存会。新盆の供養のために踊る念仏踊り。風流踊。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property in the field of folk performing arts, the Mokusa gong-and-drum nenbutsu. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2020-08-19. Located at Maikawa.

items.name: 銅造阿弥陀如来坐像
items.description: 個人蔵。平安後期12世紀。白石家阿弥陀堂の御本尊と伝わる鋳造の御像。総高51.5cm、像高49.5cm。

en.name_en: Bronze Seated Statue of Amida Nyorai (Amitabha)
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of sculpture, a bronze seated statue of Amida Nyorai. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2022-08-24. Located at Kitakata, Senmaya, Senmaya-chō.

items.name: 銚子浪分神社の猫絵馬
items.description: 個人蔵。近世～現代。銚子浪分神社に奉納された猫の描かれた養蚕祈願の小絵馬(蛇が描かれた絵馬3枚を含む)。

en.name_romaji: Chōshi Namiwake Jinja no Neko Ema
en.name_en: Cat Votive Plaques of Chōshi Namiwake Shrine
en.description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk property in the field of religious belief, cat votive plaques (ema). Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2023-04-26. Located at Kobayashi, Shibumi, Daitō-chō.

items.name: かま神
items.location: 大東町渋民字小林・千厩町千厩字北方
items.description: 個人・一関市蔵。近世～近代。竈の神、火の神、家の守り神の面。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk property in the field of religious belief, hearth-deity (kamagami) masks. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2023-04-26. Located at Kobayashi, Shibumi, Daitō-chō and Kitakata, Senmaya, Senmaya-chō.

items.name: 油しめ
items.description: 一関市蔵。近世。油を搾る用具。「立木式」「油搾木式」。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk property in the field of livelihood, an oil press. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2023-04-26. Located at Kobayashi, Shibumi, Daitō-chō.

items.name: 蕨手刀 附関係資料一括
items.description: 個人蔵。附 収蔵木箱、書簡類、封筒、名刺、蕨手刀破片。奈良時代8世紀後半。全長58.5cm。摺沢八幡神社に次ぐ三振り。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of archaeological materials, a warabite-style sword together with related materials. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2023-09-22. Located at Hakkeshita, Kinomi, Fujisawa-chō.

items.name: 長昌寺の提瓶
items.description: 宗教法人長昌寺蔵。古墳時代6世紀末～7世紀前葉。須恵器。昭和33年(1958)発見。器高25.4-26.1cm。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of archaeological materials, a spouted vessel (teibei). Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2023-09-22. Located at Amazutsumi, Kinomi, Fujisawa-chō.

items.name: ご天王様の獅子舞(西黒沢)
items.subcategory: 無形民俗文化財(民俗芸能)
items.description: 西黒沢獅子舞保存会。7月20日頃の八雲神社「ご天王さま」の祭礼の獅子舞。

en.name_en: Lion Dance of the Tennō Festival (Nishi-Kurosawa)
en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property in the field of folk performing arts, a lion dance of the Tennō festival. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2024-08-21. Located at Kawanoue, Hagishō.

items.name: 古内神楽
items.subcategory: 無形民俗文化財(民俗芸能)
items.description: 古内神楽保存会。幕末から明治期の旧仙台藩領域北部の南部神楽。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, an intangible folk property in the field of folk performing arts, the Furuuchi kagura. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2024-08-21. Located at Notebai, Hagishō.

items.name: 獅子頭(大泉院)
items.subcategory: 有形民俗文化財(年中行事)
items.description: 個人蔵。中世～近世。修験寺院大泉院所有の獅子頭。「天正11(1583)年」銘文あり、造立年不明。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk property in the field of annual observances, a lion-dance head. Municipally designated by Ichinoseki City on 2025-08-27. Located at Izumidai, Usuginu, Kawasaki-chō.
